target.title: fix(ui): show actionable error feedback when config.openFile fails
target.body:
Fixes #87020

## Summary
- Enhanced `config.openFile` gateway handler to detect headless environment failures (`xdg-open` + `no method available`) and return actionable error messages
- Control UI `openConfigFile` now properly handles `{ ok: false }` responses, displays error via `state.lastError`, and copies config path to clipboard as fallback
- Updated gateway tests to expect detailed error format and added regression test for headless environment error detection

## Root cause
The original implementation returned a generic `"failed to open config file"` error without distinguishing headless environment issues. The Control UI did not check `{ ok: false }` responses, so users saw no feedback when the opener failed in VPS environments lacking graphical handlers.

## Real behavior proof

**Behavior addressed:** Gateway `config.openFile` detects headless Linux environment opener failures (`xdg-open` + `no method available`) and returns actionable error messages with file path. Control UI displays error via `state.lastError` and copies config path to clipboard.

**Real environment tested:** Local macOS source checkout of PR branch `fix/87020-config-openfile-error-feedback`, commit `c253c096ea`, rebased on `origin/main`. Gateway unit tests executed with Vitest runner.

**Exact steps or command run after this patch:**
```bash
node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/gateway/server-methods/config.test.ts --reporter=dot
pnpm build
pnpm check:changed --base upstream/main
```

**Evidence after fix:**
```text
 RUN  v4.1.7 /Users/hope/ai-project/openclaw

 Test Files  2 passed (2)
      Tests  17 passed (17)
   Duration  6.85s

gateway test: returns actionable headless environment error
  ✓ error === "Cannot open file in headless environment. File path: /tmp/config.json..."

gateway test: returns detailed error when opener fails
  ✓ error === "Failed to open config file: spawn xdg-open ENOENT"

build: ✓ built in 674ms
check:changed: all checks passed
```

**Observed result after fix:**
- Server-side: Gateway returns `{ ok: false, path, error }` with actionable headless message or detailed opener error
- Client-side: UI clears `state.lastError` with `null`, handles `!res.ok`, displays error, copies path to clipboard
- Tests: 17 tests pass covering both error paths

**What was not tested:** Live headless VPS environment browser screenshot; behavior verified via gateway unit tests and UI controller code path review.

## Verification
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/gateway/server-methods/config.test.ts` — 17 tests pass
- `pnpm build` — successful
- `pnpm check:changed --base upstream/main` — passes
target.author: linux2010
